title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dabur India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dabur India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!
